MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Paul Perdue, Clerk: Felicia Green, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Dace Dislere, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Progressive Properties.
Attorney, Daniel M. Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendants, Michael Carbone and Kevin Hoffman are present.
Attorney, James F. Rusk representing the defendants through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.
